pageContext.name: Green Snake - Owner of Precious Jade - Fox Demon
pageContext.description: The Owner of Precious Jade appears in the movie White Snake 2: The Tribulation of the Green Snake (or just shortened to Green Snake)as the owner of a magic shop. A fox demon in the form of a young woman, she has two faces- a human face in front, and a fox face on the back of her head. She possesses the ability to turn her head 180 degrees around and speak with her fox face, which changes her voice to sound much deeper and older.  Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present this amazing collectible, the Owner of Precious Jade - Fox Demon Sixth Scale Collectible based on one of the standout characters from the 2019 animated Chinese film White Snake and its sequel Green Snake. This mischievous and mysterious character- even lacking an official name beyond her job title and species!- is nevertheless a fan favorite based on her personality, design, and role within the series of movies.  This sixth scale figure stands approximately 8.66 inches tall and comes with a variety of accessories based on her appearance in White Snake. Order today to add to your collection!
